calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Order Authorizing Particular Transactions: Regarding Community Property
Off Calendar Oct-24-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lenore Gerard for and John McDonald.

The Court noted that Carmen McDonald was not present. The Court granted the petition but will not include powers to execute Powers of Attorney (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.
